headline: Workday OnePay Tie Up Links Financial Wellness To Valuation Story
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has partnered with OnePay to integrate financial wellness tools into Workday Wellness. The collaboration introduces AI driven benefit recommendations and access to OnePay's financial services for employees. The move expands Workday's presence in workplace financial technology and broadens its employee benefits offering. Workday, trading at $112.5, has experienced a 50.3% decline over the past year and a 45.3% decline year to date, pointing to a period of weak recent...
